case_title: BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP, INC VS. DAVID R. SENECHEK, M.D., INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANKERS HEALTHCARE GROUP, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVID R. SENECHEK, M.D., INC. SENECHEK, DAVID R. $66,846.40 PRINCIPAL, $1,252.48 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $68,548.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
